picks.narrative: A 7.7pp gap: IBP has PIT at 58.2%, the market at 49.5%. There's no standout starter, lineup, or bullpen signal driving this — the gap comes from the model's baseline read of the side, not a visible matchup edge. The main pushback is home field (~-1.1pp): CLE's home-field context weighs against the pick playing on the road. With a headwind that size, this is not a clean all-signal read. The price has held roughly steady since posting — the current -102 still sits inside the playable range (to -118). This is mostly a price play — the model likes the number more than the matchup, so the baseball case is mixed.

picks.narrative: A 4.5pp gap: IBP has LAA at 41.0%, the market at 36.4%. The main pushback is pitcher quality (xfip) (~-2.0pp): Grayson Rodriguez 5.12 xFIP vs Tarik Skubal 2.90 xFIP. With a headwind that size, this is not a clean all-signal read. The price has held roughly steady since posting — the current +174 still sits inside the playable range (to +170). This isn't a clean all-signal agreement — it's the model calling the posted number too generous for the true win probability.

picks.narrative: Model and market disagree on STL by 4.2pp — 52.3% fair against a 47.6% price. No individual baseball factor clears the bar for a headline here — this is not a single visible mismatch, it is the model pricing the side differently than the market. The main pushback is defense (oaa) (~-0.5pp): ARI defense grades +15 OAA better on the season — a run-prevention headwind. The price has held roughly steady since posting — the current +108 still sits inside the playable range (to +107). The read here is the price, not the profile — the model just makes this a better side than the posted number does.

picks.narrative: IBP makes LAD 55.1% fair versus a 51.2% no-vig market price — a 4.1pp gap. The largest lift is defense (oaa) (~+0.6pp): LAD defense grades +18 OAA better on the season — a run-prevention edge. The main pushback is pitcher quality (xfip) (~-0.6pp): Emmet Sheehan 3.90 xFIP vs Ryan Weathers 3.27 xFIP. The market has drifted against the pick since posting, widening the available price — the current -104 still sits inside the playable range (to -104). The edge is the model pricing LAD differently than the market rather than one of the marquee starter/lineup/bullpen buckets — worth taking at the number, not chasing past it.
